==War Moons==
{|class="wikitable"
!Pedestal
!colspan="2"|Task
!Rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Left
|Dig Mine
|Dig out all 9 Mines on tiles: 3.2; 6.2; 12.2; 21.2; 28.2; 38.2; 46.2; 50.2; 63.2
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Right
|Clear Domain
|Clear Steel Gate; Jaden Foundry; Minerva Foundry; Pawson Foundry; Hinga Foundry; Bladden Foundry; Racky Foundry; Nethrone Foundry; Thundos Foundry; President's Office
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Left
|Destroy Divine Weapons
|Destroy the Pawson Claw; Bladden Sword; Jaden Spear; Racky Cannon; Thundos Hammer; Nethrone Coffin; Minerva Staff; Hinga Lotus
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Right
|Explore Domain
|Investigate the tiles within the Steel Gate; Jaden Foundry; Minerva Foundry; Pawson Foundry; Hinga Foundry; Bladden Foundry; Racky Foundry; Nethrone Foundry; Thundos Foundry; President's Office
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Back-Middle
|War God
|Defeat Racky and Racky's Head
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +5
|}

===Moon Shop===
{|class="wikitable"
!Item
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}}
!Quantity Available
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +1.5k}}
|2||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}
|3||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ghostfire Blueprint|orange}}
|4||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wormhole Refiner, +1k}}
|5||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|6||1
|-
|After Domain is 100%<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Murikan Nebula Pack|orange}} ({{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +1k}} and {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}})
|7||1
|}

==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|-
|Store
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name
!Notes
!Rewards
|-
|rowspan="2"|1
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Job Seeker]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Recruitment Intro
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Chore Stamp}} +100
|-
|2
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Job Seeker]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|3
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Recruiting Manager]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|File Deposit Box
|{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}}: 9394
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}} +5<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|4
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Job Seeker]]
|
|T1 Racky's Module +3
|-
|5
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Job Seeker]]
|
|T1 Racky's Module +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|6
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T4 minions for 18h 11m
|B-tads +12k<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +480<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +2
|-
|rowspan="2"|7
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Security Director]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Security Director]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +300
|-
|8
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Pawson Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +3
|-
|9
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Pawson Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Module +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|10
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Pawson Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Idle Injector
|Requires 200 Organ Slime
|Snail HP +100
|-
|11
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Pawson Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Module +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|12
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T4 minions for 18h 11m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +480<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wormhole Refiner}} +400<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +2
|-
|13
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Pawson Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Module +4
|-
|14
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Pawson Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|15
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|The Great Jang Geum]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Treasures of the Embassy
|Display Awakened {{RewardIconWithLink|King Dangun Statue|orange}}
|Master Scroll +40
|-
|rowspan="3"|"16"
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Sanil|Pawson Claw]] in Forging
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Broken Pawson Claw
|
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|green|War|Broken Pawson Claw}} 
|-
|17
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Bladden Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +3
|-
|18
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Bladden Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Module +4
|-
|19
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Bladden Project Manager]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|20
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Bladden's First Apprentice]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Duel
|Display {{RewardIconWithLink|Bladden's Head|green}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +50
|-
|rowspan="2"|21? <!-- between 17 and 22 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|T1 Racky's Module +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T4 minions for 21h 49m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +640<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +3<br>{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|22
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Bladden Project Staff]]
|
|T1 Racky's Alloy +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|23
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Bladden's Second Apprentice]]
|
|T1 Racky's Core +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Talk the Talk
|Answers: Tachi; Fencer Sasaki; Kyber crystal; A cross-shaped cut; Fast Draw
|Gear RF +5
|-
|rowspan="3"|"24"
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Bladden Sword]] in Forging
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Broken Bladden Blade
|
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|green|War|Broken Bladden Blade}} 
|-
|25
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Bid Receptionist]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|26
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Design Team 1]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Head of Design Team 1]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +30
|-
|rowspan="2"|27
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Design Team 2]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Head of Design Team 2]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +30
|-
|rowspan="2"|28? <!-- just above 27 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T5 minions for 21h 48m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +640<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}} +16<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|29
|style="background-color:var(--red-text)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Design Team 10]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Head of Design Team 10]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +30
|-
|30
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Data Keeper]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|31
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Design Team 6]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Head of Design Team 6]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +30
|-
|rowspan="2"|32
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Design Team 7]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Head of Design Team 7]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +30
|-
|33
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Data Keeper]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|"34"
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Jaden Weapon Foundry
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|Jaden Spear Blueprint}} (Used to craft {{RewardIconWithGearlink|green|War|Broken Jaden Spear}} when Racky's Throne is at max level)
|-
|35
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|36? <!-- up/right from 25 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Salesclerk]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|
|See [[#Store|the Store]] for details
|
|-
|37
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|38
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T5 minions for 1d 1h 27m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +720<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Time Chest}} +600<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|39 
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Strategic Defense System
|Display Awakened {{RewardIconWithLink|SkyWeb Hub|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wormhole Refiner}} +50
|-
|40
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Ex. Intel. Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|41? <!--just left/up from 38 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Dejected Director
|Defeat [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Ex Intel. Director]]
|{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (9394)<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}} +3<br>{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|42? <!-- twice left/up from 38 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Project Staff]]
|
|Tool Chest +30
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Secret Signal Station
|Display {{RewardIconWithLink|RedShore Emitter|green}}
|-
|43
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="3"|"44"
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Untested [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Racky Cannon]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Undestructed Racky Cannon/Racky Cannon Foundry
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +10
|-
|45
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Thundos Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|46
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Module|green}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T5 minions for 1d 1h 27m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +720<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +600<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +4
|-
|47
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Thundos Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Alloy|green}} +4
|-
|48
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Thundos Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T2 Racky's Core|green}} +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|49 
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Omegatron MK2]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Duel [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Omegatron MK2]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|50? <!-- up/left from 48 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T6 minions for 1d 5h 5m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +800<br>Fungus Chest +1,000<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|"51"
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Thundos Hammer Foundry
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +10
|-
|52
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)">|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Nethrone Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +3
|-
|53
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Nethrone Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|54 
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Nethrone Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Psionic Collector
|Requires 17.2k FTH
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest}} +50<br>{{RewardIconWithText|4h Soul Red|red}} (Soul of Senior Job Seeker)<br>{{RewardIconWithText|2h Soul Red|red}} (Soul of Job Seeker) +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|55? <!-- up/left from 53 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Nethrone Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Underground Freezer
|Display 5 star {{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Stone|orange}}
|-
|56
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Nethrone Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +3
|-
|57
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Nethrone Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|58
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Doombringer Mk. II]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Duel [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Doombringer Mk. II]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="6"|"59" 
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Netherealm Soul]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Netherealm Soul]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Netherealm Soul]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Nethrone Coffin]] in Forging
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Broken Nethrone Coffin
|
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|green|War|Broken Nethrone Coffin}} 
|-
|60
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|61
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Holy Tower of Water
|Defeat the [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Water Elementals]]
|Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Expert Scroll +20
|-
|rowspan="2"|62
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Holy Tower of Earth
|Defeat the [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Earth Elementals]]
|Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Expert Scroll +20
|-
|rowspan="2"|63?
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T6 minions for 1d 5h 5m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +800<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}} +2<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +5
|-
|64
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Module|blue}} +4
|-
|65
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enmies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|66
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Holy Tower of Wind
|Defeat the [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Wind Elementals]]
|Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Expert Scroll +20
|-
|67
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Alloy|blue}} +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|68
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Minerva Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T3 Racky's Core|blue}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Holy Tower of Fire
|Defeat the [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Fire Elementals]]
|Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Trainee Scroll +10<br>Expert Scroll +20
|-
|rowspan="3"|"69"
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Minerva Staff]] in Forging
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Broken Minerva Staff
|
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|green|War|Broken Minerva Staff}} 
|-
|70
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Hinga Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|71
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Mahoraga]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Eight Subordinates
|Defeat [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Mahoraga]]
|B-tads +30k
|-
|rowspan="2"|72? <!-- up/right from 70 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Miner]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Dispatch any 50 T6 Minions for 1d 8h 43m
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Murikan Treasure Map}} +960<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Laser Prism Component}} +6<br>{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|-
|73
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Hinga Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|74
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Kinnara]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Eight Subordinates
|Defeat [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Kinnara]]
|B-tads +30k
|-
|75
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Hinga Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|76
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Garuda]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Eight Subordinates
|Defeat [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Garuda]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Electromagno Repeller|green}}
|-
|77
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Hinga Project Staff]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|78? <!-- down/right from 77 -->
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Asura]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Eight Subordinates
|Defeat [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Asura]]
|Gear RF +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|"79"
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Project Director]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Hinga Dais Foundry
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +10
|-
|80
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Gate Guard]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|81
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Guards]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Abandoned Robotic Arm
|Requires 6,000 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|War God's Guard Beta|orange|Robots}}
|-
|82
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +4
|-
|83
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +4
|-
|84
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +5
|-
|85
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +5
|-
|86
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +5
|-
|87
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +5
|-
|88
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +5
|-
|89
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Tentacle]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +5
|-
|90
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky Guards]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Module|purple}} +5
|-
|rowspan="3"|91
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky]]
|
|{{Retext|T4 Racky's Alloy|purple}} +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|[[#Enemies fought by minions|Racky]]
|
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|green|War|Broken Racky Cannon}} <br>{{Retext|T4 Racky's Core|purple}} +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Racky's Broken Helmet
|Defeat [[#Enemies fought by the Snail|Racky]]
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Racky's Head|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|War Moon}} +1
|}

==Store==
{{ShopRowHeader|Shop}}
|-
!rowspan="4"|
{{ShopRow|AR2-T4|orange|4k {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}|AR2-T3|purple|800 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}|AR2-T2, +2|blue|600 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}}}
{{ShopRow|AR2-T1, +3|green|300 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}|War Weapon Tech, (Unlocks War Gear Slots)|white|100k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}|War Moon|white|50k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}}}
|}

==Enemies fought by Minions==
{|class="wikitable"
!rowspan="2"|Tile
!rowspan="2"|Enemy
!rowspan="2"|Troop RUSH<br>req.
!colspan="4"|Stats
!rowspan="2"|Power
!rowspan="2"|Number
|-
!HP!!ATK!!DEF!!RUSH
|-
|1||Job Seeker||3,100,000||55.1k||13.7k||8,088||10.9k||38,258||160
|-
|2||Job Seeker||3,140,000||56k||13.9k||8,216||11k||38,862||160
|-
|3||Recruiting Manager||3,320,000||68.1k||15.2k||8,986||12.1k||43,186||160
|-
|4||Job Seeker||3,180,000||56.9k||14.1k||8,345||11.2k||39,471||160
|-
|5||Job Seeker||3,220,000||57.7k||14.3k||8,474||11.4k||40,082||160
|-
|6||Miner||3,270,000||58.6k||14.6k||8,604||11.6k||40,669||160
|-
|7||Security Director||3,370,000||70.3k||15.6k||9,203||12.4k||44,284||170
|-
|8||Pawson Project Staff||3,380,000||60.9k||14.2k||8,412||11.3k||40,143||170
|-
|9||Pawson Project Staff||3,560,000||67.1k||15.1k||8,942||12k||42,907||170
|-
|10||Pawson Project Staff||3,470,000||63.9k||14.7k||8,675||11.7k||41,512||170
|-
|11||Pawson Project Staff||3,420,000||62.4k||14.5k||8,544||11.5k||40,825||170
|-
|12||Miner||3,660,000||71k||15.6k||9,211||12.4k||44,395||170
|-
|13||Pawson Project Staff||3,610,000||73.2k||15.4k||9,076||12.2k||44,066||170
|-
|14||Pawson Project Staff||3,520,000||65.5k||14.9k||8,808||11.8k||42,206||170
|-
|15||The Great Jang Geum||3,720,000||73.3k||16k||9,435||12.7k||45,528||180
|-
|"16"||Project Director||3,770,000||79.9k||16.4k||9,661||13k||47,101||180
|-
|17||Bladden Project Staff||3,740,000||69.9k||14.9k||8,829||11.9k||42,730||180
|-
|18||Bladden Project Staff||3,790,000||71.6k||15.2k||8,964||12.1k||43,449||180
|-
|19||Bladden Project Staff||3,840,000||74.3k||15.4k||9,100||12.2k||44,266||180
|-
|20||Bladden's First Apprentice||3,980,000||81.3k||16.5k||9,735||13.1k||47,546||180
|-
|21?||Miner||3,890,000||76.1k||15.6k||9,237||12.4k||45,002||180
|-
|22||Bladden Project Staff||3,990,000||84k||16.1k||9,513||12.8k||46,915||180
|-
|23||Bladden's Second Apprentice||4,080,000||90.7k||16.8k||9,927||13.4k||49,252||180
|-
|"24"||Project Director||4,130,000||92.6k||17k||10k||13.5k||50,020||190
|-
|25||Bid Receptionist||4,070,000||78.1k||15.5k||9,153||12.3k||44,862||190
|-
|26||Design Team 1||4,120,000||79.6k||15.7k||9,257||12.4k||45,434||190
|-
|27||Design Team 2||4,280,000||85.3k||16.2k||9,568||12.9k||47,268||190
|-
|28?||Miner||4,410,000||86.5k||16.3k||9,605||12.9k||47,537||190
|-
|29||Design Team 10||4,500,000||98.4k||16.9k||9,987||13.4k||50,270||190
|-
|30||Data Keeper||4,170,000||81.2k||15.8k||9,361||12.6k||46,011||190
|-
|31||Design Team 6||4,340,000||88k||16.4k||9,673||13k||47,953||190
|-
|32||Design Team 7||4,390,000||94.4k||16.5k||9,777||12.2k||49,020||190
|-
|33||Data Keeper||4,320,000||82.8k||16k||9,464||12.7k||46,590||190
|-
|"34"||Project Director||4,580,000||101k||17.2k||10.1k||13.7k||51,382||200
|-
|35||Racky Project Staff||4,480,000||87.8k||15.7k||9,271||12.5k||46,312||200
|-
|36||Salesclerk||4,640,000||99.5k||17k||10k||13.5k||50,539||200
|-
|37||Racky Project Staff||4,590,000||90k||16k||9,481||12.8k||47,379||200
|-
|38||Racky Project Staff||4,700,000||93k||16.4k||9,691||13k||48,531||200
|-
|39||Racky Project Staff||4,640,000||91.5k||16.2k||9,586||12.9k||47,953||200
|-
|40||Ex Intel. Director||4,920,000||102k||17.3k||10.1k||13.7k||51,523||210
|-
|41?||Miner||4,820,000||97k||16.8k||9,903||13.3k||47,784||200
|-
|42?||Racky Project Staff||4,480,000||87.8k||15.7k||9,271||12.5k||46,312||230
|-
|43||Racky Project Staff||4,760,000||95.4k||16.6k||9,797||13.2k||49,198||200
|-
|"44"||Project Director||4,980,000||111k||17.4k||10.3k||13.9k||52,856||210
|-
|45||Thundos Project Staff||4,840,000||98.3k||15.9k||9,377||12.6k||47,793||210
|-
|46||Miner||5,020,000||105k||16.4k||9,695||13k||49,803||210
|-
|47||Thundos Project Staff||4,900,000||100k||16k||9,483||12.8k||48,454||210
|-
|48||Thundos Project Staff||4,960,000||103k||16.2k||9,589||12.9k||49,125||210
|-
|49||Omegatron MK2||5,180,000||113k||17.4k||10.2k||13.8k||52,900||210
|-
|50?||Miner||5,490,000||123k||16.9k||10k||13.5k||52,867||230
|-
|"51"||Project Director||5,560,000||116k||17.7k||10.4k||14.1k||54,023||220
|-
|52||Nethrone Project Staff||5,080,000||110k||16k||9,448||12.7k||49,308||220
|-
|53||Nethrone Project Staff||5,150,000||112k||16.2k||9,555||12.9k||49,952||220
|-
|54||Nethrone Project Staff||5,250,000||116k||16.4k||9,674||13k||50,811||220
|-
|55?||Nethrone Project Staff||5,190,000||114k||16.2k||9,567||12.9k||50,155||220
|-
|56||Nethrone Project Staff||5,310,000||118k||16.6k||9,780||13.2k||51,473||220
|-
|57||Nethrone Project Staff||5,380,000||121k||16.7k||9,887||13.3k||52,138||220
|-
|58||Doombringer Mk. II||5,540,000||127k||17.6k||10.3k||14k||54,774||230
|-
|rowspan="4"|"59"||Project Director||5,500,000||131k||16.8k||9,925||13.3k||53,317||230
|-
|Netherealm Soul||5,570,000||134k||17k||10k||13.5k||54,043||230
|-
|Netherealm Soul||5,640,000||138k||17.2k||10.1k||13.6k||54,891||230
|-
|Netherealm Soul||5,780,000||144k||17.5k||10.3k||13.9k||56,382||230
|-
|60||Minerva Project Staff||5,610,000||123k||16.3k||9,602||12.9k||51,196||230
|-
|61||Minerva Project Staff||5,680,000||124k||16.4k||9,710||13.1k||51,801||230
|-
|62||Minerva Project Staff||5,750,000||126k||16.6k||9,818||13.2k||52,411||230
|-
|63?||Miner||6,080,000||133k||17.2k||10.1k||13.7k||54,552||230
|-
|64||Minerva Project Staff||5,820,000||128k||16.8k||9,926||13.4k||53,025||230
|-
|65||Minerva Project Staff||5,880,000||130k||17k||10k||13.5k||53,644||230
|-
|66||Minerva Project Staff||5,950,000||132k||17.2k||10.1k||13.6k||54,267||230
|-
|67||Minerva Project Staff||6,030,000||135k||17.4k||10.2k||13.8k||55,003||230
|-
|68||Minerva Project Staff||6,100,000||136k||17.5k||10.3k||13.9k||55,632||230
|-
|"69"||Project Director||6,270,000||153k||18.1k||10.6k||14.4k||58,562||240
|-
|70||Hinga Project Staff||6,020,000||139k||16.4k||9,708||11.8k||51,985||240
|-
|71||Mahoraga||6,450,000||158k||18.8k||11.1k||14.5k||60,353||240
|-
|72?||Miner||6,090,000||142k||16.8k||9,945||12.3k||53,389||240
|-
|73||Hinga Project Staff||6,160,000||145k||17.2k||10.1k||12.7k||54,817||240
|-
|74||Kinnara||6,520,000||161k||19.3k||11.3k||15k||61,878||240
|-
|75||Hinga Project Staff||6,230,000||148k||17.7k||10.4k||13.2k||56,266||240
|-
|76||Garuda||6,600,000||164k||19.7k||11.6k||15.5k||63,422|||240
|-
|77||Hinga Project Staff||6,310,000||151k||18.1k||10.6k||13.7k||57,732||240
|-
|78?||Asura||6,650,000||166k||19.9k||11.6k||15.7k||63,980||250
|-
|"79"||Project Director||6,680,000||168k||20.2k||11.9k||16k||64,982||250
|-
|80||Gate Guard||6,380,000||161k||18.3k||10.8k||13.8k||59,231||250
|-
|81||Racky Guards||6,460,000||164k||18.6k||10.9k||14.1k||60,178||250
|-
|82||Racky Tentacle||6,530,000||166k||18.9k||11.1k||14.4k||61,137||250
|-
|83||Racky Tentacle||6,760,000||174k||19.7k||11.6k||15.2k||64,075||250
|-
|84||Racky Tentacle||6,920,000||179k||20.2k||11.9k||15.8k||66,077||250
|-
|85||Racky Tentacle||7,080,000||185k||20.8k||12.2k||16.4k||68,112||250
|-
|86||Racky Tentacle||6,610,000||169k||19.1k||11.2k||14.6k||62,106||250
|-
|87||Racky Tentacle||6,690,000||171k||19.4k||11.4k||14.9k||63,086||250
|-
|88||Racky Tentacle||6,840,000||177k||20k||11.7k||15.5k||65,073||250
|-
|89||Racky Tentacle||7,000,000||182k||20.5k||12.1k||16.1k||67,092||250
|-
|90||Racky Guards||7,200,000||188k||21.3k||12.5k||16.8k||69,678||250
|-
|rowspan="2"|91
|rowspan="2"|Racky||7,450,000||195k||22.2k||13k||17.6k||72,495||1
|-
|7,500,000||205k||24.3k||14.3k||19.3k||78,700||1
|}

==Enemies fought by the Snail==
'''All enemies have Special Stats of: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%'''

'''Racky has the Special Stats of: CRIT +100%, HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%'''
{|class="wikitable"
!rowspan="2"|Tile
!rowspan="2"|Enemy
!colspan="3"|Stats
!rowspan="2"|Weakness
|-
!ATK!!DEF!!HP
|-
|7||Security Director||48,405||32,270||1,102,338||AFFCT 72,450
|-
|16||Pawson Claw||61,110||40,740||1,724,115||AFFCT 82,300
|-
|"24"||Bladden Sword||62,475||41,650||1,760,492||AFFCT 83,275
|-
|26||Head of Design Team 1||50,820||33,880||1,160,892||AFFCT 74,550
|-
|27||Head of Design Team 2||52,028||34,685||1,208,846||AFFCT 75,525
|-
|29||Head of Design Team 10||55,860||37,240||1,427,637||AFFCT 78,450
|-
|31||Head of Design Team 6||53,235||35,490||66,154||AFFCT 61,020
|-
|32||Head of Design Team 7||54,548||36,365||1,287,350||AFFCT 77,325
|-
|40||Ex Intel. Director||66,780||44,520||1,848,008||AFFCT 85,050
|-
|"44"||Racky Cannon||63,840||42,560||1,796,904||AFFCT 84,100
|-
|49||Omegatron MK2||68,250||45,500||1,884,357||AFFCT 86,025
|-
|58||Doombringer Mk. II||69,720||46,480||1,920,734||AFFCT 87,000
|-
|"59"||Nethrone Coffin||65,310||43,540||1,856,618||AFFCT 85,075
|-
|rowspan="4"|61||Water Element I||50,820||38,720||1,033,987||AFFCT 74,400
|-
|Water Element II||55,860||42,560||1,178,328||AFFCT 78,300
|-
|Water Element III||61,110||46,560||1,325,212||AFFCT 82,150
|-
|Water Mage||66,780||50,880||1,475,915||AFFCT 86,050
|-
|rowspan="4"|62||Earth Element I||50,820||42,560||831,492||AFFCT 74,400
|-
|Earth Element II||55,860||47,880||952,268||AFFCT 78,300
|-
|Earth Element III||61,110||52,380||1,074,894||AFFCT 82,150
|-
|Earth Mage||66,780||57,240||1,200,059||AFFCT 86,050
|-
|rowspan="4"|66||Wind Element I||50,820||33,880||1,257,633||AFFCT 74,400
|-
|Wind Element II||55,860||37,240||1,427,637||AFFCT 78,300
|-
|Wind Element III||61,110||40,740||1,600,964||AFFCT 82,150
|-
|Wind Mage||66,780||44,520||1,779,563||AFFCT 86,050
|-
|rowspan="4"|68||Fire Element I||50,820||29,040||1,502,430||AFFCT 74,400
|-
|Fire Element II||5,860||31,920||1,700,194||AFFCT 78,300
|-
|Fire Element IiI||61,110||34,920||1,902,149||AFFCT 82,150
|-
|Fire Mage||66,780||38,160||2,111,005||AFFCT 86,050
|-
|"69"||Minerva Staff||66,780||44,520||1,916,453||AFFCT 86,050
|-
|71||Mahoraga||66,780||44,520||1,642,674||AFFCT 85,050
|-
|74||Kinnara||69,720||46,480||1,849,596||AFFCT 87,000
|-
|76||Garuda||72,660||48,440||2,112,169||AFFCT 87,650
|-
|78?||Asura||92,505||61,670||3,170,758||AFFCT 101,750
|-
|91||Racky||70,000||46,000||10,000,000||AFFCT 87,700
|}

[[Category:Murikan Domain]]
